prompt:
A progression card showing hand-drawn Venus crescents and gibbous shapes across different dates, with orientation arrows and neat shape comparisons. A small eyepiece cap and red light nearby make it clearly a repeated visual observation record from telescope sessions.

Photorealistic 512×512 image with soft low lighting, realistic paper and graphite texture, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the card centered and uncluttered.
